decision_framework: X3 ATOMIC STAR Mainnet Proof Machine

discovered_in: Audit 4: INV-006 not verified (0% test coverage)
p0_blockers_consolidated.impact: Validators can sign multiple blocks at same height with NO consequences. Byzantine safety compromised. Network consensus broken.
p0_blockers_consolidated.evidence: pallet-staking and pallet-offences removed in Audit 1 as unwired. No equivocation detection pallet in construct_runtime!

discovered_in: Audit 5: TESTGAP-014 critical blocker (72/72 tests single-node)
p0_blockers_consolidated.impact: Cannot verify 3+ validators reach consensus. Network might fork, stall, or fail to launch. Finality safety unproven.
p0_blockers_consolidated.evidence: All 72 unit tests single-node only. No multi-validator testnet deployment visible.

p0_blockers_consolidated.issue: Sender address FORGERY via unvalidated parameter
discovered_in: Security: Can claim to be any sender
p0_blockers_consolidated.impact: Attacker can impersonate any user, consume their nonce quota, initiate fraudulent transfers. Authorization completely broken.
p0_blockers_consolidated.evidence: xvm_transfer accepts sender: AccountBytes without verification that caller matches sender
p0_blockers_consolidated.fix_complexity: MEDIUM - Add signature validation or precompile requirement

p0_blockers_consolidated.issue: Storage UNBOUNDED STATE GROWTH - transfers never pruned
p0_blockers_consolidated.impact: State bloat over time → node storage fills → network DOS via storage exhaustion. Liveness failure after ~1-2 years.
p0_blockers_consolidated.evidence: Code comment: 'entries retained for audit; a later reaper CAN prune' (not implemented)

p0_blockers_consolidated.impact: Blockchain could become insolvent without detection. Funds could drain faster than deposits arrive.
p0_blockers_consolidated.evidence: No test verifies total_reserves >= total_liabilities across all accounts

high_severity_issues.fix: Add upgrade/downgrade tests with state validation

high_severity_issues.issue: EDGE CASE coverage missing (0, max_u128 amounts)

decision_reasoning: Despite achieving 90.32/100 weighted score (above the 90% threshold), FIVE CRITICAL P0 BLOCKERS prevent mainnet launch: (1) Validator equivocation detection not implemented - breaks Byzantine safety, (2) Multi-node consensus never tested - cannot verify network will work, (3) Sender address forgery - authorization broken, (4) Unbounded storage growth - DOS risk, (5) Vault solvency not tested - financial risk. These blockers represent fundamental failures in consensus safety, network deployment, authorization, and financial integrity. Fixing these requires 2-3 weeks and significant re-engineering (especially equivocation detection). Network cannot be launched while these critical safety properties are unproven or missing.
recommendation: DO NOT LAUNCH MAINNET. Recommend 2-3 week halt to implement fixes: (1) Implement equivocation detection, (2) Deploy multi-node testnet and verify consensus, (3) Add sender validation, (4) Implement storage pruning, (5) Add vault solvency test. Re-audit after fixes applied.
conditions_for_go: ✅ FIX REQUIRED: Implement validator equivocation detection (staking pallet or signed statements)
✅ FIX REQUIRED: Deploy 3+ validator testnet, verify consensus with 100+ blocks
✅ FIX REQUIRED: Add sender validation (signature verification OR precompile requirement)
✅ FIX REQUIRED: Implement Transfers storage pruning in on_initialize
✅ FIX REQUIRED: Add vault_solvency integration test (100+ random transactions)
✅ TEST REQUIRED: Add max_expiry_blocks parameter with tests
✅ TEST REQUIRED: Add boundary value tests (0, max_u128, etc)
✅ TEST REQUIRED: Add runtime upgrade/downgrade safety tests
✅ TEST REQUIRED: Test finality reversion on multi-node network
✅ TEST REQUIRED: Test fresh node bootstrap to consensus
re_audit_requirements: After implementing fixes above, ALL FIVE AUDITS must be re-run to verify blockers resolved and no new issues introduced.
final_decision_statement: X3 Mainnet Proof Machine: NO-GO ❌ - DO NOT LAUNCH. Critical consensus safety, deployment, authorization, and financial integrity issues must be resolved before mainnet launch.
audit_completion: ✅ All 5 Phase 3b AI audits completed successfully
